fail_conditions: B04_R1 is treated as adapter, tournament, router, or lobe ratification.
Unregistered crucible results count toward promotion eligibility.
Crucible pressure results count without required replay or receipt evidence.
Any Gate D widening above the selected bounded postures is implied by R1.
terminal_rule: R1 completes only when crucible and pressure law are machine-ratified and later adapter promotion remains fail-closed until the next ordered ratification step.
